title: megastachya eragrostis
intro: Megastachya eragrostis, also known as African lemongrass or East African lemongrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Megastachya eragrostis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stalks of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are used to treat various health conditions.
